titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Berkeley College, Yale University, Records of the Master
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday November 13, 2020 at 11:50

did.unittitle: Berkeley College, Yale University, records of the master
did.abstract: The records consist of correspondence and administrative files documenting the students and activities of the master of Berkeley College, Yale University. Also included are Robert Triffin's records on the Yale Class of 1969 Legal Defense Fund.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 13-C-2 (YRG 13-C-2), Records of the master of Berkeley College.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is partially restricted. See Collection Contents for details.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Berkeley College, Yale University, Records of the Master (RU 441). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of correspondence and administrative files documenting the students and activities of the master of Berkeley College, Yale University. Also included are Robert Triffin's records on the Yale Class of 1969 Legal Defense Fund.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The title "Master" for chief executive officers of residential colleges was changed to "Head of College" in April of 2016.

did.unittitle: Subject files and summer session records

odd.head: General
odd.p: See also: box 3, James Gamble Rogers

did.unittitle: Bulletins, Army Co. A and E
Portraits of Master's Seymour and Hemingway
Rogers, James Gamble, architect for Berkeley College
Bishop Devils: musical arrangements, including many anonymous arrangers and Fenno Heath
(Grades sent to M.A.T. Office in Graduate School)
Preliminary Registration cards, Yale and Non-Yale students, A - Z
(Grades sent to M.A.T. Office in Graduate School)
Records of the Legal Defense Fund

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

did.unittitle: Records of scholarships and financial programs
Legion Hall, University College of Ghana (Legon, Accra, W. Africa)
Administrative records documenting life at Berkeley College
Berkeley Players-Bill Francis Costume Designs for Epicaene
Portrait of George Dudley Seymour (in Master's Office)
Photographs of Thomas C. Mendenhall (Berkeley Master)
Various Berkeley Rooms, taken by Mr. Street for Alumni Magazine
Slides of Swiss Faience Stove, taken by David Richards
